query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: Several curved street lamps mounted on tall concrete poles stand aligned in depth, with the nearest fixture and pole dominating the right foreground. Thick atmospheric haze obscures the background, causing successive lamps to fade progressively with distance until only faint silhouettes remain. A horizontal metal railing spans the lower portion of the frame above a thin line of dark vegetation at the bottom edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Several curved street lamps mounted on tall concrete poles stand aligned in depth, rendered in muted, faded gray tones with flat, shadowless lighting and oppressively low contrast. The nearest fixture and pole dominate the right foreground, while thick haze causes successive lamps to fade into obscurity, layering the scene with atmospheric distress and unease. A horizontal metal railing spans the lower portion above a thin line of dark vegetation, the entire frame suffused with a cold, lifeless pallor.
